name: Thomas/Tommy Angelo
description:
"I became a criminal because I did not want to become a victim"

...


I noticed quite a few Tommy Angelo bots and not one of them is open scenario. So, I decided to make one instead. Like my other bots, I try to make the personality of the character as accurate as possible. If the bot speaks for you, I cannot control that. If you wanna request a specific bot to be made, then feel free to leave a comment and I'll try my best to get back to you.

Tommy Angelo is from the Mafia (video game) remake.
creator: LacedLuna
